name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Codex-first development workflow plugin with evidence-backed review orchestration, plan handoffs, TUI presentation guidance, and Linear work organization.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-first workflow with review, plan handoff, TUI presentation, and Linear planning
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to run evidence-backed code and plan reviews with Codex subagents as the primary reviewers, package copy-pasteable plan handoffs for other agents, validate and execute written plans with controller-owned verification, and use agy as external counsel for substantial reviews. It also includes TUI presentation guidance for structured chat output and Linear work organization for projects, milestones, issues, and dependencies.
